name: Ossobucco
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge veal shanks in flour and sauté in a mixture of butter and oil in a large, heavy frying pan.
2. Season with salt and pepper. Transfer to a three-quart casserole.
3. Using the pan drippings and frying pan, sauté onion, carrots, celery, and garlic for about six minutes or until softened but not browned.
4. Add wine and boil until it almost evaporates.
5. Add stock and simmer for five minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper. Pour mixture evenly over meat in the casserole.
7. Add bay leaves, one at each side of the casserole.
8. Cover and bake on the middle rack of the oven pre-heated to 300°F for 1 1/2 hours.
9. Five minutes before end of baking time, add Gremolata topping.
Gremolata Topping
Combine in a cup:
3 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley
1 tablespoon grated lemon rind
1 tablespoon grated orange rind
1 teaspoon chopped garlic
